title: Skill Audit Ready Workflow
description: Review one skill and prepare a granular PR readiness decision.
deliverable: skill review report and PR readiness verdict

phases.title: Clarify Target
outputs: confirmed branch, skill, and write scope
checkpoint: target skill and allowed write set are explicit

phases.title: Inspect Package
checkpoint: all core files, assets, scripts, examples, evals, and templates are inspected

phases.title: Apply Scoped Improvements
outputs: updated skill package and review document
checkpoint: git diff contains only approved skill and review paths

phases.title: Verify Readiness
outputs: PR readiness verdict with validation evidence
checkpoint: DoD, script checks, check.sh, and scoped diff checks pass

quality_gates: frontmatter includes command, description, skills, and agents
every phase has agents, inputs, outputs, and checkpoint
failure_handling: if the target skill is missing, switch to the fallback skill or stop
if a validator fails, report the exact command and failing output
if unrelated changes appear, leave them untouched and scope validation

example_dialogue.assistant: I will clarify the target, inspect the package, apply scoped improvements, and verify PR readiness.
